B

BuildingFromScratchExample - Class in uz.maniac4j.examples
Complex usage example demonstrating building JSON from scratch.

D

DomainMappingExample - Class in uz.maniac4j.examples
Example demonstrating how to map JSON to Domain objects without Reflection, Setters, or DTOs.

F

Fallback - Class in uz.maniac4j.alivejson.build
JSON decorator that returns a fallback value if a key or index is missing.

I

ImmutableTreeUpdateExample - Class in uz.maniac4j.examples
Ultra complex example demonstrating immutable tree updates on deeply nested JSON.
